basic_details.job_title: NMMC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 32 Multi Purpose Worker (Male) / Staff Nurse Posts
basic_details.short_information: Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation (NMMC) Multi Purpose Worker (Male) / Staff Nurse Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NMMC. A total of 32 vacancies have been announced through the NMMC Multi Purpose Worker (Male) / Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 38 years Age Relaxation for Reserved Category: 43 years

qualification.education_qualification: 12th Science + Paramedical basic training or Sanitary Inspector course, 12th pass and General Nursing and Midwifery Diploma or B.Sc. Nursing
qualification.details: Multi Purpose Worker (Male) MPW (Male): 12th Science + Paramedical basic training or Sanitary Inspector course. Staff Nurse (Female & Male): 12th pass and General Nursing and Midwifery Diploma or B.Sc. Nursing, Maharashtra Nursing Council registration mandatory.

salary_details.details: Multi Purpose Worker (Male): Rs. 18000 Per Month Staff Nurse (Female & Male): Rs. 20000 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NMMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.nmmc.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.click_here: Official Notification PDF For Multi Purpose Worker

rows.navi_mumbai_municipal_corporation_nmmc: 12th Science + Paramedical basic training or Sanitary Inspector course, 12th pass and General Nursing and Midwifery Diploma or B.Sc. Nursing

content_sections.heading: NMMC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NMMC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NMMC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NMMC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Multi Purpose Worker (Male) MPW (Male): 12th Science + Paramedical basic training or Sanitary Inspector course. Staff Nurse (Female & Male): 12th pass and General Nursing and Midwifery Diploma or B.Sc. Nursing, Maharashtra Nursing Council registration mandatory.

content_sections.heading: NMMC Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 38 years Age Relaxation for Reserved Category: 43 years

content_sections.heading: NMMC Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Multi Purpose Worker (Male): Rs. 18000 Per Month Staff Nurse (Female & Male): Rs. 20000 Per Month

rows.event: Application start date for Staff Nurse
Last date for submission of application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NMMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.nmmc.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NMMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the application form for the NMMC recruitment is 03-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the post names for which NMMC is recruiting?
faq.answer: NMMC is recruiting for the posts of Multi Purpose Worker (Male) and Staff Nurse (Female and Male).

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies released by NMMC?
faq.answer: A total of 32 vacancies have been released by the Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation for the mentioned posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Multi Purpose Worker (Male) post?
faq.answer: For the Multi Purpose Worker (Male) post, candidates need to have passed 12th Science and completed a Paramedical basic training or Sanitary Inspector course.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 38 years. However, candidates from reserved categories can avail of age relaxation up to 43 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Staff Nurse positions?
faq.answer: The Staff Nurse positions offer a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000. The Multi Purpose Worker (Male) post offers Rs. 18,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this NMMC recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. How can candidates apply for the NMMC recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply offline by downloading the application form from the official website and sending the duly filled form along with required documents to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these NMMC posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a merit list prepared from the marks obtained by the candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation (NMMC), which is https://www.nmmc.gov.in.
